channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump lashes out at NATO after countries decline to help in Iran
item.description: President Trump says NATO is making "a very foolish mistake" after countries decline to help secure the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: President Trump says NATO is making "a very foolish mistake" after countries decline to help secure the Strait of Hormuz.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez

item.title: Can cannabis treat mental health conditions? The data isn't there yet
item.description: Many people say they use cannabis for their mental health, but researchers find there is little to no evidence that cannabis can be beneficial for any psychiatric condition.
item.content:encoded: Many people say they use cannabis for their mental health, but researchers find there is little to no evidence that cannabis can be beneficial for any psychiatric condition.
item.dc:creator: Will Stone

item.title: Iran suffers another blow to its leadership with 2 top officials killed
item.description: Israel says it has killed two top Iranian leaders in airstrikes. One killed was the head of the National Security Council, a hardliner who had been a negotiator on Iranian nuclear talks.
item.content:encoded: Israel says it has killed two top Iranian leaders in airstrikes. One killed was the head of the National Security Council, a hardliner who had been a negotiator on Iranian nuclear talks.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Kahn

item.title: Afghanistan says at least 400 people are dead in Kabul after Pakistan airstrike
item.description: Afghanistan accuses Pakistan of hitting a hospital in an airstrike that killed hundreds and wounded hundreds more. Pakistan claims its target was a military installation
item.content:encoded: Afghanistan accuses Pakistan of hitting a hospital in an airstrike that killed hundreds and wounded hundreds more. Pakistan claims its target was a military installation
item.dc:creator: Betsy Joles

item.title: Human rights advocates: War with Iran could spark new age of nuclear proliferation
item.description: Could the war with Iran lead to a world with more nuclear weapons, not less? Mary Louise Kelly speaks with Zeid Raad Al Hussein, about a potential new age of nuclear proliferation.
item.content:encoded: Could the war with Iran lead to a world with more nuclear weapons, not less? Mary Louise Kelly speaks with Zeid Raad Al Hussein, about a potential new age of nuclear proliferation.
item.dc:creator: Mary Louise Kelly

item.title: Some Democrats shift views on U.S. military support for Israel
item.description: Even before Israel and the U.S. attacked Iran, candidates running for office were having to navigate shifting attitudes on U.S. policy toward the Middle East, specifically about Israel's war in Gaza.
item.content:encoded: Even before Israel and the U.S. attacked Iran, candidates running for office were having to navigate shifting attitudes on U.S. policy toward the Middle East, specifically about Israel's war in Gaza.
item.dc:creator: Scott Shafer

item.title: President Trump endorses Rep. Massie's challenger in Kentucky primary
item.description: Republican Rep. Thomas Massie has been a thorn in President Trump's side since his first term. Now Trump hopes backing Massie's primary opponent will be enough to oust the seven-term congressman.
item.content:encoded: Republican Rep. Thomas Massie has been a thorn in President Trump's side since his first term. Now Trump hopes backing Massie's primary opponent will be enough to oust the seven-term congressman.
item.dc:creator: Justin Hicks

item.title: Living in boats: A postcard from Galveston County
item.description: More people are choosing to live aboard their boats, not only as a unique lifestyle choice in coastal cities, but also many are concerned about affording paying for a home or an apartment.
item.content:encoded: More people are choosing to live aboard their boats, not only as a unique lifestyle choice in coastal cities, but also many are concerned about affording paying for a home or an apartment.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Washburn

item.title: Counterterrorism director who supported Trump resigns over opposition to Iran war
item.description: Joe Kent, head of the National Counterterrorism Center, has resigned over his opposition to the war in Iran. He had backed President Trump because Trump vowed not to get involved in new wars in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: Joe Kent, head of the National Counterterrorism Center, has resigned over his opposition to the war in Iran. He had backed President Trump because Trump vowed not to get involved in new wars in the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: Mary Louise Kelly

item.title: Travelers around the U.s. are hit with weather, airline and security delays
item.description: Travelers around the country are being hit with weather, airline and security delays.
item.content:encoded: Travelers around the country are being hit with weather, airline and security delays.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel J. Sánchez
